Finance & Economy.headline: Sensex crashes 1,200 pts as oil, ₹ & Trump storm hit D-Street
Finance & Economy.detail: The Indian stock market benchmark, Sensex, experienced a significant plunge of 1,200 points due to rising oil prices, a weakening rupee, and market uncertainty fueled by Trump's policies. This market downturn reflects investor concerns about the combined impact of global economic factors and political developments.

Finance & Economy.headline: Eurozone inflation soars to 3% as Iran war drives up energy prices
Finance & Economy.detail: Inflation in the Eurozone has sharply increased to 3%, primarily driven by rising energy prices attributed to the ongoing Iran war. The conflict's impact on energy markets is causing significant economic challenges for European countries.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil price rockets to wartime high as Trump eyes fresh military action in Iran
Finance & Economy.detail: Oil prices have surged to a new wartime high amid escalating tensions as Trump considers further military actions against Iran. The potential for increased conflict is driving up concerns about global oil supplies and prices.

Finance & Economy.headline: Bank of England signals interest rate hikes ahead despite April hold
Finance & Economy.detail: Despite holding steady in April, the Bank of England has signaled likely interest rate hikes in the coming months due to rising oil prices. Policymakers are concerned about the potential for inflation and are preparing to take action.

Finance & Economy.headline: Meta shares plunge on rising concerns over AI spending spree
Finance & Economy.detail: Shares of Meta have dropped significantly as investors express concerns over the company's increasing spending on artificial intelligence. Despite advancements in AI, investors are wary of the financial implications of Meta's aggressive investments in the sector.

Technology.headline: Slimmed-Down Amazon Fire TV Stick Is Faster and Ditches the Wall Adapter
Technology.detail: The 2026 Fire TV Stick HD, which launched today, is powered by your TV's USB port, meaning fewer cables running around your TV and one more spare wall outlet for your other gadgets.

Technology.headline: Firefox's New Boss Has an Old-School Plan to Win You Back From Chrome
Technology.detail: Ajit Varma, the head of Firefox, stated Firefox will 'Build better features, build a better browser, and then people will use it.'

Technology.headline: Satellite-Connected Cows? Starlink Mobile Now Used for Livestock Tracking
Technology.detail: A company that helps ranchers track and manage cow herds via GPS collars is now connecting to these devices with Starlink Mobile, eliminating the need to rely on ground-based radio towers.

Technology.headline: 19-Year-Old Nabbed in Ukraine for Hijacking 610,000 Roblox Accounts
Technology.detail: The teen conspired with two friends to target the accounts by using info-stealing malware dressed up as a game-enhancing software, according to Ukrainian authorities.

Technology.headline: The best cloud phone systems of 2026: Expert tested and reviewed
Technology.detail: Experts have tested and reviewed the best cloud phone systems of 2026.

Science.headline: Hidden Ocean Heat Is Creeping Toward Antarctica's Fragile Ice Shelves
Science.detail: Deep beneath the Southern Ocean, warm water is moving closer to Antarctica, posing a threat to its ice shelves, which scientists are observing clearly for the first time. This phenomenon could have significant implications for global sea levels.

Science.headline: Scientists Reveal the Best Exercise for Knee Arthritis Pain Relief
Science.detail: A review of 217 trials indicates that aerobic exercises, such as walking, cycling, and swimming, are the most effective for managing knee osteoarthritis by reducing pain and improving movement. This outperforms other forms of exercise in providing relief.

Science.headline: A Photon Was Teleported Across 270 Meters in Stunning Quantum Breakthrough
Science.detail: Scientists achieved quantum teleportation of a photon's state between two separate quantum dots over a 270-meter open-air link, demonstrating the ability to transmit quantum information between independent devices. This marks a crucial advancement in quantum communication technologies.

Science.headline: A Hidden Map in Your Nose Could Explain How Smell Works
Science.detail: Researchers have discovered that smell receptors in the nose aren't randomly arranged but organized in a neat manner, cracking a major mystery about how smell is organized. This finding was made by mapping millions of neurons in mice.

Science.headline: Blocking a protein called PTP1B could be a new weapon against Alzheimer's
Science.detail: Researchers have identified a new potential weapon against Alzheimer's: blocking a protein called PTP1B, which in mice, boosted memory and helped brain immune cells clear harmful plaque buildup. PTP1B is also linked to diabetes.

Health.headline: Brain scans reveal 3 ADHD subtypes, including a more extreme form
Health.detail: A study analyzing 1,154 children and adolescents breaks new ground in how to think about the growing diagnosis.

Health.headline: Molecular switch guides neurons through developing brain, revealing opposing migration pathways
Health.detail: Research reveals how a molecular switch guides neurons through the developing brain, shedding light on opposing migration pathways.

Health.headline: Australia becomes the 30th country to eliminate trachoma as a public health problem
Health.detail: Australia has been recognized as the 30th country to eliminate trachoma, a bacterial eye infection, as a public health concern.

Health.headline: Can Radiation Reduce Refractory Ventricular Tachycardia?
Health.detail: Medscape reports on the potential of radiation to reduce refractory ventricular tachycardia.

Health.headline: New dual-target drug may help overcome immunotherapy resistance in pancreatic cancer
Health.detail: A new drug that targets two pathways shows promise in overcoming immunotherapy resistance in pancreatic cancer, according to Medical Xpress.

Sports.headline: Schroder's halftime speech, 11 points in 4th quarter spark Cavaliers to victory over Raptors
Sports.detail: Dennis Schroder's impactful halftime speech and strong fourth-quarter performance propelled the Cavaliers to a win against the Raptors.

Sports.headline: Howden's short-handed goal gives Golden Knights 5-4 double-OT win over Mammoth and 3-2 series lead
Sports.detail: Brett Howden scored a short-handed goal in double overtime, securing a 5-4 victory for the Golden Knights over the Mammoth and giving them a 3-2 series lead.

Sports.headline: Texier breaks 3rd-period tie, Canadiens beat Lightning 3-2 in Game 5 to take series lead
Sports.detail: Alex Texier's goal in the third period broke the tie, leading the Canadiens to a 3-2 victory over the Lightning in Game 5 and giving them the series lead.

Sports.headline: GT vs RCB IPL 2026 Playing 11 Today Match: Jacob Bethell to remain Virat Kohli's opening partner
Sports.detail: In today's IPL match between Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Jacob Bethell is expected to continue opening alongside Virat Kohli.

Sports.headline: FOX Sports Announces 2026 FIFA World Cup Match Commentators and Reporters
Sports.detail: FOX Sports has revealed its commentator and reporter lineup for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

Entertainment.headline: Lisa Kudrow exposes the dark side of 'Friends' set with troubling writer room claims
Entertainment.detail: Lisa Kudrow, known for her role as Phoebe Buffay on the hit sitcom 'Friends,' has revealed unsettling aspects of the show's writer room dynamics.

Entertainment.headline: David Allan Coe, outlaw country singer-songwriter, dies aged 86
Entertainment.detail: David Allan Coe, the controversial and influential outlaw country musician known for songs like 'You Never Even Call Me by My Name,' has passed away at the age of 86.

Entertainment.headline: Tupac Shakur's family files wrongful death lawsuit against suspect
Entertainment.detail: The family of Tupac Shakur has filed a wrongful death lawsuit against the man who is suspected of killing the rapper in 1996.

Entertainment.headline: Rachel Zegler's award-winning Evita to hit Broadway in 2027
Entertainment.detail: Rachel Zegler, fresh off her award-winning performance, will bring her rendition of Evita to Broadway in 2027.

Entertainment.headline: Anne Hathaway says she didn't get any size-zero models fired from The Devil Wears Prada 2
Entertainment.detail: Anne Hathaway addressed rumors that she had size-zero models fired from 'The Devil Wears Prada 2'.

Crime & Justice.headline: New Orleans sheriff indicted after investigation into brazen jailbreak and escape of 10 inmates
Crime & Justice.detail: The sheriff in New Orleans has been indicted following an investigation into a jailbreak where 10 inmates escaped.

Crime & Justice.headline: UK vows to tackle antisemitism 'emergency' as police probe double stabbing attack
Crime & Justice.detail: The British government has declared antisemitism in the U.K. an “emergency” and announced plans to spend millions on increasing security around Jewish sites after a double stabbing.

Crime & Justice.headline: Two Jewish men stabbed in London 'terrorist attack'
Crime & Justice.detail: A suspect has been arrested after two Jewish people were stabbed in a Jewish neighborhood of London.

Crime & Justice.headline: 9 people arrested in massive raids on religious sect in U.K.
Crime & Justice.detail: Nine people were arrested in raids on the U.K. headquarters of the AROPL religious sect, on suspicion of modern slavery, forced marriage and sexual offenses.

Crime & Justice.headline: US press gala shooting suspect charged with attempting to kill Trump.
Crime & Justice.detail: The suspect in the shooting at the White House correspondents' dinner has been charged with attempting to kill President Trump.

Education.headline: Families to save up to £1,000 as children's reforms become law
Education.detail: New reforms in the UK are projected to save families up to £1,000. These reforms likely pertain to children's services and education policies.

Education.headline: Alvarez, Patel rewrite California superintendent of education's role
Education.detail: Gov. Gavin Newsom's plan to shift control of the Department of Education in California faces revisions led by Assembly members Darshana Patel and David Alvarez, potentially increasing legislative oversight and modifying the state superintendent's responsibilities. The proposed changes include making the state superintendent an independent evaluator and increasing legislative appointments to the State Board of Education.

Education.headline: Teacher pay in Florida worst in the country — again. FEA blames DeSantis, GOP-majority Legislature
Education.detail: The Florida Education Association (FEA) criticizes Governor Ron DeSantis and the Republican-majority Legislature, asserting that they are undermining public schools by prioritizing voucher and charter programs, as Florida's teacher salaries remain the lowest in the nation. The average teacher salary in Florida is $56,600, significantly lower than the national average of $74,400.

Education.headline: Austin ISD received single SB 1882 bidder for three middle schools
Education.detail: Austin ISD is considering a single bid from the Texas Council for International Studies to manage Dobie, Webb, and Burnet middle schools to avoid state intervention. The Texas Education Agency will decide by the end of May whether the partnership qualifies for SB 1882 benefits, which, if denied and the schools continue to underperform, could lead to state takeover.

Education.headline: Generative AI Pervades Higher Education: Here's How Three Institutions Responded
Education.detail: Swarthmore College, Emporia State University, and Oberlin College are navigating the integration of generative AI into their academic environments, with varying approaches to policy and implementation. Emporia State is implementing AI policies and training, while Oberlin College is undertaking a year-long exploration of AI, and Swarthmore has yet to implement a school-wide policy.

Lifestyle.headline: 2026 wedding style guide: What today's brides and grooms are choosing
Lifestyle.detail: A guide to the wedding styles and trends that are popular among brides and grooms in 2026.

Lifestyle.headline: 7 skin changes dermatologists link to potential heart disease risks
Lifestyle.detail: Dermatologists are highlighting seven skin changes that could be indicative of underlying heart disease risks, emphasizing the importance of recognizing these signs for early detection and prevention.

Lifestyle.headline: 5 red flags in 'perfect' relationships that often go unnoticed
Lifestyle.detail: This article discusses five subtle but significant red flags that can be present in seemingly perfect relationships, advising readers to be aware of these signs to ensure a healthy partnership.

Lifestyle.headline: Ashley Graham on the GLP-1 era and shrinking bodies: "It's really disheartening"
Lifestyle.detail: Ashley Graham expresses her disappointment with the current trend of using GLP-1 drugs for weight loss and the pressure to achieve shrinking body sizes.

Lifestyle.headline: Hungary found guilty by EU's top court over anti-LGBTQ laws
Lifestyle.detail: The EU's top court has found Hungary guilty of violating EU law with its anti-LGBTQ legislation, which has faced widespread criticism for discriminating against LGBTQ individuals.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: Let's do it again, Pittsburgh
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The NFL Draft spurred regional cooperation, motivated public realm improvements, and showcased Pittsburgh positively, leading to a call for bidding on similar major events and reviving local festivals.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Mamdani's pension gimmick sidesteps the city's real problem
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The editorial criticizes New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's plan to delay pension payments as a short-term fix that fails to address the city's underlying fiscal issues, advocating for spending cuts and economic growth instead.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: Seek ballroom legally
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses President Trump's attempts to build an event hall at the White House and insists that Trump needs to seek approval from key federal agencies and Congress to move ahead with his project.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Bernie Sanders' dangerous China AI cooperation fantasy
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The opinion piece criticizes Bernie Sanders for inviting Chinese academics to advocate for slowing down the US pursuit of artificial intelligence, arguing that it is naive to trust China in this critical technological race.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: UAE's Opec exit
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The UAE's exit from OPEC is another sign of the major geopolitical shifts that are reshaping the global order.

World.headline: Guinea Launches AgriConnect Compact to Transform Agri-Food Systems, Strengthen Food Security, and Create Jobs
World.detail: The Government of Guinea, partnering with the World Bank Group, has launched the Guinea AgriConnect Compact to accelerate sustainable agrifood system transformation, strengthen food and nutrition security, create jobs, and drive inclusive growth and industrialization. The initiative aligns with the 2040 Simandou Agenda, focusing on agriculture and livestock as key drivers for economic diversification and export development.

World.headline: UAE oil break exposes deepening Saudi rift as Gulf power shifts
World.detail: The United Arab Emirates' decision to quit OPEC and OPEC+ has brought years of tensions with Saudi Arabia out into the open, marking a strategic break with Saudi-led oil governance in a rebalancing of power shaped by the Iran war. The conflict has increased economic pressure on the ⁠UAE, giving it a bigger incentive to break ​free of the constraints of OPEC oil output quotas, the sources said.

World.headline: EU says troop deployments in Europe 'in US interest'
World.detail: The EU stated that the deployment of U.S. troops in Europe is in Washington's interest, following President Trump's threat to cut force numbers in Germany amidst disagreements over the Iran war. An EU spokeswoman emphasized the U.S. as a vital partner in European security and defense, noting that European allies are also increasing their defense spending.

World.headline: Commission issues recommendations to protect vulnerable consumers from high energy prices
World.detail: The European Commission has issued recommendations to protect vulnerable households from energy disconnections, help them manage energy supply contracts, and encourage active participation in the clean energy transition through self-production and sharing. These recommendations aim to empower consumers, prevent disconnections, and support the development of energy communities and self-consumption models, contributing to cleaner energy and lower prices.

World.headline: Trump to be briefed on new Iran military options Thursday
World.detail: President Trump is scheduled to be briefed on potential new military actions in Iran by CENTCOM Commander Adm. Brad Cooper, signaling a serious consideration to resume major combat operations. This briefing suggests Trump is weighing options to break the negotiation logjam or deliver a final blow before ending the war.

Zimbabwe.headline: Harare Orders Removal of Illegal Billboards, Murals and Banner
Zimbabwe.detail: The City of Harare has ordered property owners to remove all unauthorized billboards, murals, and banners erected without council approval, warning that strict enforcement action will follow for those who fail to comply. The directive targets structures placed on road servitudes as well as those mounted on private buildings without clearance.

Zimbabwe.headline: Mugabe Cousin Begins Three-Year Jail Term As Chatunga Deported
Zimbabwe.detail: Tobias Matonhodze, cousin to Chatunga Mugabe, has begun a three-year jail term in South Africa after Chatunga was deported. Chatunga Mugabe was deported after being fined R600,000.

Zimbabwe.headline: Sean Mnangagwa Among Nine Majors Elevated To Lieutenant Colonel
Zimbabwe.detail: President Mnangagwa has promoted his son, Sean Mnangagwa, to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel in the army. The promotion was part of a larger elevation of nine Majors to Lieutenant Colonel.

Zimbabwe.headline: Matabeleland South receives hay balers, mowers under Presidential Input Programme
Zimbabwe.detail: Matabeleland South has received hay balers and mowers under the Presidential Input Programme. This is part of an effort to improve agricultural productivity in the region.

Zimbabwe.headline: Khaya Arts set for Bulawayo show ahead of debut festival
Zimbabwe.detail: Khaya Arts is set to perform in Bulawayo ahead of their debut festival. The performance is expected to showcase the group's talent and build anticipation for the festival.
